channel.title: openapi-spec Architecture Docs
channel.description: Architecture documentation for the openapi-spec codebase. Explore files, functions, classes, domains, and dependencies.

item.title: DistributionRegistry Domain — openapi-spec Architecture
item.description: Handles how the specification is packaged and consumed across the Node.js ecosystem. Architectural overview of the DistributionRegistry domain in the openapi-spec codebase. Contains 0 source files.

item.title: OpenApiSpec Domain — openapi-spec Architecture
item.description: The primary domain responsible for defining the RESTful interface and data models for code analysis services. Architectural overview of the OpenApiSpec domain in the openapi-spec codebase. Contains 0 source files.

item.title: package.json — openapi-spec Source File
item.description: Architecture documentation for package.json, a json file in the openapi-spec codebase.
